name: Prediction Market Signal Aggregator
description: Real-time prediction market odds from Polymarket, Kalshi, and Metaculus combined with social sentiment from Twitter/X, Reddit, and TikTok via mobile proxies. Detects arbitrage spreads and sentiment divergence.
longDescription: Aggregate live prediction market data with social sentiment signals to identify mispricings. Pulls odds from Polymarket (CLOB API + Gamma), Kalshi Trade API, and Metaculus community forecasts. Overlays social sentiment scraped from Twitter/X, Reddit, and TikTok through real 4G/5G mobile carrier IPs. Generates: arbitrage signals (cross-platform spread detection), sentiment divergence alerts (when social opinion departs from on-chain odds), and volume spike detection. Four endpoints: /signal (full market analysis), /arbitrage (all active spreads), /sentiment (topic-level social analysis), /trending (top markets by divergence score). Inspired by the $40M in trader profits from cross-platform prediction market arbitrage between 2024-2025.

pricing.comparison: Polymarket data alone: free via public API. Kalshi: free. Metaculus: free. Twitter API for sentiment: $100/month minimum. Reddit API: $100/month. The value is combining all sources + running sentiment scraping through mobile proxies at <$0.05/query.

whyMobileProxy: Twitter/X aggressively blocks datacenter IPs from the search and timeline API. Reddit blocked free API access in 2023. TikTok's content API requires mobile-like User-Agent patterns and mobile carrier IPs to avoid serving empty responses. Mobile proxy IPs (real 4G/5G carrier traffic) appear as authentic mobile users, bypassing rate limits and bot detection that would block datacenter IPs entirely.

twitter.topTweets: Array<{ text, likes, retweets, author, timestamp }>

limitations: Twitter sentiment uses Nitter fallback when direct API blocked
TikTok sentiment is estimated from hashtag/topic data
Metaculus data is community-based (not financial odds)
Rate limited to 10 requests/minute per client IP
